name: AnalysisLoadGroup
summary: The AnalysisLoadGroup class contains information related to analysis load groups.

constructors.name: AnalysisLoadGroup
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisLoadGroup class.

methods.name: GetTypeName
methods.summary: Get load group type name, translated to current language.

returns.doc: The load group type name, translated to current language.

methods.name: IsEmpty
methods.summary: Check if load group is empty (no loading exists).

returns.doc: True if load group is empty (no loading exists).

methods.name: IsSelfWeight
methods.summary: Check if load group is self weight load group.

returns.doc: True if load group is self weight load group.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an AnalysisLoadGroup. The ID has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: Compatible
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the load group is compatible.

properties.name: CompatibleNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the load group compatible number.

properties.name: Direction
properties.summary: Gets or sets the direction of the load group.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: Incompatible
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the load group is incompatible.

properties.name: IncompatibleNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the load group incompatible number.

properties.name: LoadGroupID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the load group.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the load group.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the load group.
